newsSinceJun6: No material company-specific news since June 6. The latest catalysts all predate the window: Computex 2026 edge-AI conference and World Partner Conference ran June 1-4, and a June 4 Digitimes piece detailed Advantech's edge-AI ecosystem/software strategy. Q1 record results (revenue NT$20.39B, +17% YoY, edge AI 20.5% of sales, 30% full-year target, new 100% cash dividend policy) were reported May 6. Today's +3.93% move (YTD now +70.9%) appears flow/momentum-driven post-Computex rather than fundamental.

sources.label: BigGo Finance - Advantech Q1 2026 record revenue, edge AI 20.5%, dividend upgrade (May 6, 2026)
Digitimes - Advantech pushes ecosystem strategy as edge AI gains momentum (June 4, 2026)
Digitimes - Advantech five-year edge AI roadmap, CEO-to-chair transition (May 14, 2026)

verdicts.rankRationale: On a latent/under-owned alpha list, a name the thesis already concedes is 'a recognized edge-computing supplier' rallying another +3.9% on post-Computex momentum (YTD +71%, up from +64% at yesterday's hold) with zero new fundamental evidence since June 6 is residual-alpha erosion, not discovery. The setup has shifted toward crowded post-rerating chase since yesterday's verdict.
verdicts.bull: Edge AI is tracking ahead of plan (20.5% of Q1 revenue vs 30% full-year target) and the new 75-80% cash payout plus NT$2 special dividend gives a shareholder-return floor under a structural physical-AI growth story.
verdicts.neutral: Q2 guidance (US$645-670M, 38-40% GM) implies steady but not accelerating growth; the stock is consolidating Computex enthusiasm and the thesis is intact but fully recognized at ~$13B market cap after a 71% YTD rerate.
verdicts.bear: At +71% YTD the edge-AI optionality is largely priced; component shortages temper margins, and any slip versus the 30% edge-AI mix target or an industrial-PC cycle stall would hit a now-crowded, momentum-held name hard.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Monthly revenue prints and H2 evidence that edge AI mix is on the path to the 30% target; follow-through design wins from Computex 2026 partner ecosystem.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-Computex momentum unwind: a richly rerated, well-owned name with no incremental news de-rating on any edge-AI mix miss or industrial demand wobble.
